messages.text:
BL-PROBE-repaint-check — OPERATOR PROBE 2: tap Approve and watch this ask repaint (BL-484 now live) — safe to ignore
What it solves: Throwaway operator probe, not a real ticket - DO NOT action, promote, or spec it.
Tap Approve (or Reject) on THIS ask: with BL-484 now live, the three buttons should
vanish and a verdict line ('-- Approved <time> UTC' / '-- Rejected: <reason>') should
appear on the message. That is the repaint you …
First acceptance signal: After a decision tap, the ask's inline buttons are removed and a verdict line is appended to the message
Approval context: Operator probe to prove BL-484's close-on-decision repaint is live on the current front-desk build. Tap Approve to watch the buttons drop and the verdict line appear. No real decision is needed - this ticket will be deleted after you confirm. Safe to reject or ignore.
BL-PROBE-repaint-check needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-PROBE-repaint-check" (or "reject BL-PROBE-repaint-check <reason>") to act.
